articles.title: EasyJet Calls Castlelake Approach ‘Highly Opportunistic’
articles.summary: EasyJet Plc called the overture by investment firm Castlelake LP “highly opportunistic” given its depressed stock price and cautioned that a takeover of the UK carrier would be fraught with risk.

articles.title: Block Trade King Simon Sadler Takes the Stand in Segantii Trial
articles.summary: Segantii Capital Management founder Simon Sadler chose to take the stand Monday to give evidence in the insider trading trial that has gripped trading floors and boardrooms across Hong Kong.

articles.title: SMBC Nikko Mulls Launching $627 Million Japan Mezzanine Fund

articles.title: South Africa Factory Sentiment Worsens as Demand Fades

articles.title: Pakistan Inflation Climbs as Iran War Drives Energy Costs
articles.summary: Pakistan’s inflation accelerated to the highest in two years as the war in the Middle East pushed up energy import costs.

articles.title: Berkshire Hathaway to Buy Taylor Morrison for $6.8 Billion

articles.title: Growth Spurt for UK Factories Set to Be Short-Lived, PMI Shows
articles.summary: UK factories grew at the fastest pace in four years as the industry sought to get ahead of price increases and supply strains triggered by the Middle East conflict, a key survey found.
